text.headline: The Great War in Context
text.text: A local JSON feed shaped for a Symfony or API Platform endpoint. Events carry photos and descriptions; eras carry longer spans such as wars.

text.headline: Assassination in Sarajevo
text.text: The assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand set off the July Crisis and the cascade of alliances that led to war.

media.caption: Trench warfare on the Western Front

text.headline: World War I
text.text: A global conflict reshaped borders, empires, finance, diplomacy, and civilian life. In the modern renderer this long span can appear both as an event and as an era band.

media.caption: President Woodrow Wilson asks Congress for a declaration of war

text.headline: United States enters the war
text.text: The entry of the United States changed the scale of the conflict and accelerated mobilization across the Atlantic.

text.headline: Armistice
text.text: Fighting ended on the Western Front, though the political and economic consequences continued for decades.
